message:
test(allocation-budget): add 22 unit tests for allocation budget monitor

Covers: BudgetConfig default values, calibrated sigma clamping, calibrated
lambda bound, json_escape special/control chars, EvidenceContext prefix format,
AllocationBudget initial state, running_mean empty/with data, window_size
enforcement, with_evidence_context builder, set_evidence_context mutate,
alert resets CUSUM/e-value, alert increments total_alerts, alert field values,
CUSUM minus downward shift detection, summary initial state, BudgetSummary/
BudgetEvidence/BudgetAlert clone+debug, reset config_logged, frames counter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
